title: Exploring CNC
description: CNC machining from first principles — coordinate systems, G-code, CAD/CAM with FreeCAD, and open-source machine control. Real cuts, real numbers, no prior knowledge assumed.

items.title: Home
items.content_html: CNC machining from first principles — coordinate systems, G-code, CAD/CAM with FreeCAD, and open-source machine control. Real cuts, real numbers, no prior knowledge assumed.

items.title: Axes and Coordinate Systems
items.content_html: Every move a CNC router makes is just three numbers: X, Y, Z. Learn how machine zero, work zero, and G54 work together — and why getting zero wrong ruins a cut.

items.title: Reading G-code
items.content_html: A generated G-code file looks like a wall of numbers. Learn the handful of G and M words behind nearly every line, and why 'modal' state changes what comes next.
